problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
